description: Practice recognizing overextension signals and learning to wait rather than chase. Does NOT provide final outcome.
objectives: Practice WAIT instead of ENTER when extended

instructions: Observe price when it has moved far above MA5/MA10/MA20. Identify when chasing is tempting. Practice recording WAIT decisions with your reasoning. Does NOT provide final outcome.
rules: Record every day you feel the urge to chase
Identify the exact price level that would be acceptable to enter
